%% frontmatter/titlepage.tex
%% Cover: full-page whiteboard-style composition of the report's own
%% simulations (figures/titlepage_background.pdf, generated by
%% notebooks/06_titlepage_art.py), with the type overlaid via TikZ at
%% page-absolute positions that match the artwork's clear bands.

\thispagestyle{empty}

\definecolor{coverInk}{HTML}{2D2D2D}
\definecolor{coverSlate}{HTML}{3A5A78}
\definecolor{coverGray}{HTML}{8B8378}

\begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture, overlay]
  % full-bleed background artwork
  \node[anchor=center, inner sep=0pt] at (current page.center)
    {\includegraphics[width=\paperwidth, height=\paperheight]{figures/titlepage_background.pdf}};

  % ----- title block, in the clear band between the ridgeline and the motifs
  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-4.35in]current page.north)
    {\fontsize{20.5}{25}\selectfont\bfseries\textcolor{coverInk}{A STUDY OF RANDOM MATRICES}};

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-4.80in]current page.north)
    {\fontsize{13.5}{17}\selectfont\itshape\textcolor{coverSlate}{From Foundations to Spectral Clustering}};

  \draw[coverGray, line width=0.5pt]
    ([xshift=-1.15in, yshift=-5.06in]current page.north) --
    ([xshift=1.15in, yshift=-5.06in]current page.north);

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-5.32in]current page.north)
    {\large\textcolor{coverInk}{ARZAAN SINGH}};

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-5.58in]current page.north)
    {\small\textcolor{coverInk}{Under the supervision of Professor Gustavo Didier}};

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-5.81in]current page.north)
    {\small\itshape\textcolor{coverGray}{An Independent Study Report}};

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-6.05in]current page.north)
    {\small\textcolor{coverInk}{Department of Mathematics \,\(\cdot\)\, Tulane University \,\(\cdot\)\, June 2026}};

  % ----- colophon, in the clear zone between the two bottom motifs
  \node[anchor=south, text width=3.5in, align=center]
    at ([yshift=0.72in]current page.south)
    {\fontsize{7.5}{9.6}\selectfont\textcolor{coverGray}{%
      Cover: simulations from this report. Above, eigenvalue densities of the
      spiked covariance model as the signal strength \(\alpha\) sweeps through
      the threshold \(\alpha_c = 1 + \sqrt{y}\); the bulk is simulated, and the
      outlier peak is drawn at its simulated location. Around, the Tracy-Widom
      edge law, the spike-location map \(\Psi\), the spectral embedding of
      three clusters, and the entries of a top eigenvector. Generated by
      \texttt{notebooks/06\_titlepage\_art.py}.}};
\end{tikzpicture}

\clearpage
